opinion.h: KNOWLTON v. CITY OF WATERTOWN, 130 U.S. 334 (1889)
KNOWLTON v. CITY OF WATERTOWN. No. 199.
opinion.p: These cases are, in all essential respects, the same as that of No. 198, ante, 539, in which the opinion has been just announced, and the same judgment-of affirmance-is therefore rendered therein.[ Knowlton v. City of Watertown 130 U.S. 334 (1889) ]
